sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C. For Questions 24 and 25, choose TWO letters A-E. For Questions 26-30, complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: Julia and Bob’s science project is due
All the materials they use must be
A Cartesian diver was called a devil by some people because
options: A they saw it was black
B they believed in the supernatural
C they wanted the inventor to be famous

questions.content: Julia and Bob find some of the items they need
options: A in Bob’s pencil case and the recycling bin
B in the cafeteria and the Resource Centre
C in the shop and Julia’s locker
D in Bob’s bag and his pocket
E in Tara’s packet and on the floor

sections.instruction: For Questions 31-35, answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. For Questions 36-40, complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content:
Several large earthquakes were triggered by the eruption of Pinatubo on 15th June 1991 because of the (36) {{BLANK}} of the summit. The caldera thus created considerably reduced the height of the mountain. At the same time (37) {{BLANK}} was passing by and the rain associated with it mixed with the cinders in the air to form a substance called tephra which fell on the (38) {{BLANK}} of homes causing them to collapse, crushing hundreds of people.

During the eruption large amounts of Sulphur dioxide gas were emitted, which combined with (39) {{BLANK}} to make sulphuric acid which was responsible for a great deal of ozone depletion above Antarctica. The overall effect of the cloud from this great eruption was the lowering of (40) {{BLANK}}
